name: Image Save
description: Save an image to a file on disk.
doc:
Export images to disk files.

Formats:
• PNG - lossless, best for graphics/screenshots
• JPEG - smaller files, adjustable quality
• WebP - modern format, good compression

Path Options:
• Full path: C:/images/output.png
• Folder only: C:/images/ (auto-generates filename)
• Empty: uses default output folder

Output:
Returns the full path to the saved file, useful for chaining with other file operations.

properties.name: File Path
properties.description: Path to save to (or folder for auto-naming)
